justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including the initial request for "Monday next week" and the subsequent request for "Tuesday, June 9th, around my preferred time of 3pm."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed close alternatives on Wednesday when Monday and Tuesday were unavailable, offering two suitable options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent minimized unnecessary turns by combining information gathering and never asking for information the user had already provided.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when the initial preferred day was unavailable, offering new options without re-asking for information.
